title: Mendable Anvils
description: A mod that allows players to fix their anvils by shift + right-clicking an anvil with an iron ingot
body:
![Banner](https://i.imgur.com/FxXxNHK.png) ![Mod Loaders](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loaders-NeoForge/Fabric-green?style=for-the-badge) ![Environment](https://img.shields.io/badge/Environment-Server-FF4500?style=for-the-badge) [![Repository](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-Repository-blueviolet?style=for-the-badge&logo=github "Github Repository")](https://www.github.com/MincraftEinstein/MendableAnvils) [![Curseforge Page](https://img.shields.io/badge/Curseforge-Page-orange?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge "Curseforge Page")](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mendable-anvils) [![Discord Invite](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Einstein%27s%20Lab-blue?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.gg/gSsaFAvrBM) ### **📘 Description** A simple mod that allows players to fix (mend) their anvils by shift + right-clicking an anvil with an iron ingot. Anvils can also be fixed by firing an iron ingot out of a dispenser allowing for automation. The repair item can be modified with a tag located at: `mendable_anvils:tags/item/anvil_repair_items.json`
📜 Terms of Use **You may**
✅ Use this mod as a reference to understand and or create something of your own, as long as it is not a copy or recreation
✅ Use this mod in modpacks with credit and one or more links to any of the project pages*
✅ Edit for personal use
✅ Use this mod for/in YouTube videos with credit and one or more links to any of the project pages*
✅ Create resource packs, data packs, and addon mods for this mod

**You may not**
❌ Reupload/publish this mod to any website without explicit permission from me and one or more links to any of the project pages*
❌ Redistibute edited or unedited assets** from this mod without permission from me and credit

\* Project pages include CurseForge, Modrinth, Planet Minecraft, GitHub
\** Assets include logos, banners, textures, models etc
